---
title: "qc_report_template"
output: html_document
params:
  data: !r data.frame()
---


# Sequencing Summary
Quality Control results:

```{r, echo=FALSE}
table1 <- sequencing_stats(params$data)
knitr::kable(table1)

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
table2 <- quality_stats(params$data)
knitr::kable(table2)
```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_read_lengths(params$data)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_quality_distribution(params$data)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_cumulative_yield(params$data)
```
